narrative_note: 全游戏最治愈的视觉时刻之一。冬夜温泉的光晕是整个游戏里最接近「安全」的视觉隐喻。——worldbuilding.json Ch4 winter_hotspring_highlight

scene_scope.area: 森林露营地 · 山顶温泉区
scene_scope.peak_visual_moment: bg_ch4_restored_winter_night — 全章最强情感画面

required_elements.validation_rule: All 4 elements must be present in all Ch4 winter variants. Missing any element = FAILED_VALIDATION.

element_1_rooftop_snow.name: 屋顶积雪
element_1_rooftop_snow.description: 温泉小屋木瓦上一层均匀白雪，边缘悬挂细冰凌

visual_spec.snow_coverage: 均匀覆盖温泉小屋整个屋顶面，雪层厚度视觉约5-8cm
visual_spec.snow_color: #F5F5F5 (snow_white) with slight blue tint #EEF3F8 in shadow areas
visual_spec.icicle_edges: 屋檐边缘悬挂3-5cm细冰凌，透明蓝白色(#D0E8F8)
visual_spec.snow_texture: 非纯白平面；有轻微粗糙质感和顶部柔软凸起感（watercolor笔触表现）
visual_spec.layer_placement: midground — 温泉小屋是中景元素
visual_spec.contrast_note: 积雪白色与木瓦暗棕色(#4A3020)形成对比，增强冬季感

element_2_snow_particles.name: 雪花粒子
element_2_snow_particles.description: 在浓密蒸汽中若隐若现，落入温泉水面即刻融化，水面产生细小涟漪

visual_spec.density: 轻盈不密集，治愈感而非暴风雪 — 每帧屏幕内约20-40粒
visual_spec.motion: 缓慢飘落，速度30-50px/s，略带随机横向漂移(±8px/s)
visual_spec.steam_interaction: 雪花进入蒸汽区域时透明度降低至30-50%，若隐若现效果

water_interaction.effect: 即刻消失，水面产生直径8-12px的细小涟漪（2帧动画）
water_interaction.color: 涟漪使用温泉水面暖色#C4955A lighten 30%

visual_spec.fallback: 如不支持蒸汽交互，雪花在水面边界直接淡出

element_3_enhanced_steam.name: 温泉蒸汽×2密度
element_3_enhanced_steam.description: 冬季冷空气使蒸汽可视距离大幅延长，乳白色蒸汽柱向上漂散

visual_spec.base_vfx_ref: standard hot spring steam (defined in vfx-asset-spec.json)
visual_spec.steam_color: 乳白色 #F5F0E8 with very slight warm tint (temperature: ~2700K feel)
visual_spec.steam_opacity_peak: 65% at emission source, fading to 0% at 80% of height
visual_spec.steam_drift: 极缓慢向上并轻微左右漂移，速度15-25px/s
visual_spec.column_structure: 2-3条主要蒸汽柱，柱间距约120-180px，各柱有轻微相位差

color_temperature_contrast.contrast_note: 暖金蒸汽 vs 冷蓝天空形成强烈色温对比；饱和度低但色彩张力最高

visual_spec.layer_placement: foreground_elements — 前景蒸汽最明显；midground pool面蒸汽作补充

element_4_lighthouse_halo.name: 冬夜灯塔体积光晕
element_4_lighthouse_halo.description: 冬夜灯台光柱扫过雪雾，产生朦胧体积光晕

visual_spec.volumetric_effect: 光柱穿过雪雾时产生体积光晕效果（God ray / fog scatter）
visual_spec.halo_motion: 随灯台光柱旋转节奏缓慢扫过场景（与prop_lighthouse_lamp 8帧动画同步）
visual_spec.sweep_duration: 完整一圈约3-4秒（对应prop_lighthouse_lamp 8帧@12fps=0.67s循环，但背景halo扫过需3-4s低频版本）
visual_spec.snow_fog_base: 雪雾基础：雪粒子在光束区密度略增（光照雪花），增加光晕真实感
visual_spec.positioning: 灯台位置Ch4：从山顶方向照下，光柱自右上方角度穿过营地上方
visual_spec.color_contrast_peak: 暖金光晕(#F5C842) vs 深蓝黑暗雪地(#1E2E50) = 全章最强情感对比
visual_spec.narrative_significance: 是整个游戏里最接近「安全」的视觉隐喻。雪覆盖一切噪声，只剩篝火/温泉和他自己，灯塔告诉他这里有灯。

color_palette_winter_night.overall_saturation_note: 低整体饱和度(-10%)但色彩张力最高 — 冷暖对比是主要视觉张力来源，非饱和度

depth_stack_winter_night.content: 深蓝冬夜天空，星点，远山雪顶剪影，灯塔光柱远景
松树树干（压雪树枝），帐篷群，温泉小屋（积雪屋顶+木瓦），温泉池（水面涟漪），竹篱笆
苔藓岩石（积雪），蕨草（压雪），雪花粒子，蒸汽前景柱，篝火台光晕（修复后）
灯塔体积光晕halo（从右上角扫过），雪花触水涟漪，蒸汽漂散尾

restoration_state_differences.before: 温泉区废弃，无明显蒸汽（蒸汽减少30%），无篝火，积雪略厚（更显荒废）
restoration_state_differences.in_progress: 温泉水面开始出现，蒸汽×1.5（恢复中），篝火台已设置，积雪部分被打扫
restoration_state_differences.restored: 完整蒸汽×2，篝火燃烧橙光与蒸汽混合，积雪屋顶完整，温泉水面粼粼（最治愈状态）

winter_night_prompt_additions: Winter night scene with snow-covered roof on the hot spring bathhouse, thin icicles hanging from eaves
Gentle snowflakes drifting through dense white steam rising from the hot spring pool
Enhanced double-density steam columns (#F5D4A0 warm amber) against cold blue night sky (#1E2E50)
Snowflakes dissolve on contact with hot spring water surface, creating tiny ripple rings
Volumetric golden lighthouse beam (#F5C842) sweeping through snow fog from upper right, creating soft radiant halo
Strong color temperature contrast: warm golden steam and campfire glow vs cold blue-white snow and night sky
Healing aesthetic: the warmth and cold coexisting, soft and therapeutic not dramatic
negative_prompt_additions: No blizzard or storm feeling, no dense snowstorm
No harsh cold aesthetic, the scene must feel warm despite snow
No pure white snow (always slight blue tint in shadows)
No lighthouse beam that is too bright/harsh (must be soft volumetric)

implementation_notes.steam_implementation: Particle system with additive blend mode for soft steam. Two layers: pool-level emission (midground) + rising column (foreground).
implementation_notes.snow_implementation: Gravity particle with slight wind drift. Separate collision zone over hot spring pool triggers ripple spawn.
implementation_notes.lighthouse_halo_implementation: Sprite with additive blend, UV scroll or rotation matching prop_lighthouse_lamp animation cycle. Opacity 20-35% max.
implementation_notes.rooftop_snow_implementation: Static texture overlay on bathhouse midground sprite. No animation. JPG with alpha channel for transparency edges.
implementation_notes.performance_note: Total particle budget for winter night Ch4: snow(40) + steam(60) = 100 particles. Within 200 particle budget. Lighthouse halo is sprite, not particles.

validation_checklist.rooftop_snow_present: PASS — element_1 spec defined for all Ch4 winter variants
validation_checklist.snow_particles_present: PASS — element_2 spec defined, fx_season_winter_snow linked, water interaction specified
validation_checklist.enhanced_steam_x2_present: PASS — element_3 spec defined, fx_season_winter_steam_enhanced linked, spread+50% spec defined
validation_checklist.lighthouse_halo_present: PASS — element_4 spec defined for night variants, vfx_lighthouse_glow cross-referenced
validation_checklist.all_3_restoration_states_covered: PASS — before/in_progress/restored all specified with state differences
validation_checklist.color_temperature_contrast: PASS — warm gold steam (#F5D4A0) vs cold blue sky (#1E2E50) explicitly specified
validation_checklist.healing_aesthetic_maintained: PASS — density is 'gentle not blizzard', scene is warm despite cold elements

completion_notes: All 4 required winter hot-spring elements fully specified. Color palette, VFX references, depth stack, prompt enhancements, and implementation notes documented. Cross-referenced with seasonal-background-variants-spec.json Ch4 winter entries.
